items.title: Big tech must deal with scam ads under Ofcom proposals
items.summary: Ofcom says more than half of UK adults have encountered potentially fraudulent ads online.

items.title: Sunshine and Saharan Dust Make Miami’s World Cup Quarter-Final a Dangerous Game for England Norway
items.summary: English and Norwegian players will face off under extreme and dangerous levels of heat stress, scientists say, thanks to a Wet Bulb Index over over 90°F.
